Body.Content:
Today, Copilot can show up to 25 meeting results, which can limit visibility in larger calendars. We’re expanding this limit so you can see more relevant meetings at once making it easier to find, review, and act on the full context you need.

GA date: June CY2026

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Today, Copilot can show up to 25 meeting results, which can limit visibility in larger calendars. We’re expanding this limit so you can see more relevant meetings at once making it easier to find, review, and act on the full context you need.

Details.Value: Android, Desktop, iOS, Linux, Mac, Teams and Surface Devices, Web

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Additional meeting results in Copilot responses
